defs: The act of moving in a circle, or in a course which brings the moving body to the place where its motion began.
quotes: This continual circulation of human things.

defs: The act of passing from place to place or person to person; free diffusion; transmission.
quotes: The true doctrines of astronomy appear to have had some popular circulation.

defs: Currency; circulating coin; notes, bills, etc., current for coin.
The extent to which anything circulates or is circulated; the measure of diffusion; as, the circulation of a newspaper.

The movement of the blood in the blood-vascular system, by which it is brought into close relations with almost every living elementary constituent. Also, the movement of the sap in the vessels and tissues of plants.
